title: crossmem doctor --json output
description: Stable schema for the JSON output of `crossmem doctor --json`. Keys defined here MUST NOT be renamed or removed between minor versions of crossmem; new keys MAY be added (additive evolution). Consumers should ignore unknown keys.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes only; additive changes leave it unchanged.

checks.description: Ordered list of check results. Order is stable across runs for a given crossmem version.

summary.description: Aggregate counts across `checks`. `total` equals `ok + warn + fail`.

support.description: Project support metadata surfaced for LLM-driven install flows (task 19.1). The `issues_url` key is the contract referenced by `skills/crossmem-install/SKILL.md`; `docs_url` and `version` are informational companions. Additive — consumers MUST treat the block as optional.

issues_url.description: Canonical issue tracker URL for crossmem.

name.description: Stable identifier of the check (snake_case). Existing names MUST NOT be renamed across versions; new checks MAY be added.

status.description: Tri-state outcome. `ok` = requirement satisfied; `warn` = informational (e.g. optional dep missing); `fail` = user action required before crossmem can run.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation. Format is not stable; consumers MUST NOT parse it.
